basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of Banaras Hindu University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BHU Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess a Regular 2 year Master of Business Administration (MBA) / 2 Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) from any recognized University or Institute are eligible to apply for these Manager vacancies. The application process for BHU Manager Recruitment 2026 has started and candidates can submit their application via email until 10 June 2026. Candi

qualification.education_qualification: Regular 2 year Master of Business Administration / 2 Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management from any recognized University or Institute.
qualification.details: Regular 2 year Master of Business Administration / 2 Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management from any recognized University or Institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU Manager (Placement) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Manager (Placement) post at Banaras Hindu University is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager (Placement) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Regular 2-year Master of Business Administration or a 2-Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management from a recognized University or Institute.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Manager (Placement) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Manager (Placement) position in this recruitment drive by Banaras Hindu University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Manager (Placement) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Manager (Placement) role will receive a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Manager (Placement) post are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Manager (Placement) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Manager (Placement) position will primarily involve an Application Screening.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IM-BHU/2026-27/Advt.(temp.)/01.

faq.question: Q9. In which city and state is Banaras Hindu University located?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Banaras Hindu University.
